sprite.name: Green Ring
sprite.notes: This ring will look forward 5 green coins placed in the level. Once collected the 5 green coins, it will reward a powerup.

value.title: Ring ID
value.comment: This is the ID of the ring, needed to link the green coins to this ring.

list.title: Reward
list.comment: This will set the item rewarded when all coins are collected.
list.comment2: If the player has already a powerup, a 1-UP will be spawned.

sprite.name: Green Coin
sprite.notes: A group of green coins. They are connected with the Green Ring.

value.title: Ring ID
value.comment: Set the Ring ID of the green ring you are refering to.

list.title: Coin ID
list.comment: Select the coin ID for this coin. The coin ID determines what coin appear first.
